retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and account pages. Normalize before shipping to UI.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic Qadar Classic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Shandaar Account says first issuance of debit card is free for all variants except UnionPay Platinum.

notes: Annual fee is PKR 2,600 plus FED.

MCB Islamic Shandaar Account page says debit-card issuance and annual/renewal charges are free for non-Platinum variants when PKR 25,000 is deposited in the opening month or PKR 25,000 monthly average balance was maintained in the previous month.
Public account pages used in this pass show no minimum balance requirement for eligible current-account relationships.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic Qadar Gold Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: MCB Islamic Shandaar Account waives new and annual/renewal debit-card charges for non-Platinum variants when PKR 25,000 is deposited in the opening month or PKR 25,000 monthly average balance was maintained in the previous month.

notes: Annual fee is PKR 3,200 plus FED.

MCB Islamic Shandaar Account page says debit-card issuance and annual/renewal charges are free for non-Platinum variants when PKR 25,000 is deposited in the opening month or PKR 25,000 monthly average balance was maintained in the previous month.
Public account pages used in this pass show no minimum balance requirement for eligible current-account relationships.
Annual fee is PKR 7,750 plus FED.
Shandaar Account free debit-card criteria explicitly excludes Platinum from the new and annual/renewal waiver.
Public account pages used in this pass show no minimum balance requirement for eligible current-account relationships.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic PayPak Classic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: MCB Islamic Shandaar Account waives new and annual/renewal debit-card charges for non-Platinum variants when PKR 25,000 is deposited in the opening month or PKR 25,000 monthly average balance was maintained in the previous month.

notes: Annual fee is PKR 2,200 plus FED.
Asaan Current and Asaan Digital Current accounts show PKR 100 initial deposit and no minimum balance.
Asaan Remittance Current Account shows nil initial deposit and no minimum balance.
Shandaar Account page waives new and annual/renewal debit-card charges for non-Platinum variants under the published PKR 25,000 opening-month or previous-month-average-balance criteria.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic Visa Classic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: MCB Islamic Shandaar Account waives new and annual/renewal debit-card charges for non-Platinum variants when PKR 25,000 is deposited in the opening month or PKR 25,000 monthly average balance was maintained in the previous month.

notes: Official Visa Classic page exposes PKR 2,950 + FED issuance, annual, and replacement fee.
Eligibility note says all singly operated PKR accounts for individual, joint (primary), and sole proprietor customers.
Shandaar Account page publishes the non-Platinum annual/renewal waiver criteria at PKR 25,000 opening-month deposit or PKR 25,000 previous-month average balance.

gaps: No official public consumer credit-card catalogue was found in this pass.
Public debit-card pages are weak on salary, age, and numeric balance thresholds.
Visa-card fee numbers were not surfaced as cleanly as UnionPay-card fee numbers.
